overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a cloaked character walking through a misty rural landscape at night. The character traverses tall grass fields, open meadows, and a dirt path lined with wooden fences and ritual antler posts under a foggy moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty grass field with stone wall boundary

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass alongside a stone wall on the left, heading toward open fields

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the field
tall wild grass covering the open field
scattered deciduous trees with sparse foliage in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a misty grass field at night, with a stone wall running along the left side. The atmosphere is foggy with limited visibility, and scattered bare trees are visible in the distance against the dark blue sky.

events.description: moonlight becomes visible through breaking clouds, casting pale light across the field

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking through the open field toward a large tree, surveying the misty landscape

entered.detail: large deciduous tree with spreading branches becoming prominent on the right
rustic wooden fence posts visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks through an open meadow where moonlight breaks through the clouds, illuminating a large tree on the right. The stone wall falls behind as wooden fences become visible in the distance, marking the edge of the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path with ritual antler gateway

events.description: approaching wooden ritual posts topped with antlers marking a ceremonial gateway

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path toward and through a gateway marked by wooden posts with antler decorations

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
tall wooden post decorated with deer antlers marking the path entrance
matching wooden post with antlers on the right side of the path
cone-shaped structure made of wooden stakes beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character follows a dirt path flanked by wooden fences, approaching a ritual site marked by tall posts topped with antlers. The character passes between these ceremonial markers as the path continues into the misty distance, with the large tree now falling behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty rural landscape that transitions from a desolate field into a ritualistic settlement. It begins with the character walking through a foggy grass field beside a stone wall, where bare trees are barely visible against a dark blue night sky. As the character turns, the scene opens into a wide meadow where moonlight breaks through the clouds to illuminate a large tree, while the stone wall recedes to reveal wooden fences in the distance. The camera then follows the character onto a dirt path flanked by these fences, moving past the large tree toward a ritual site. Finally, the movement carries the character between tall posts topped with antlers as the path disappears into the lingering mist.
